completed_tasks.name: Notifications page dark canvas with floating elements
Cards VCN issuance overlay — dark terminal style with card build scan animation
visa-gov-sdk initial release (VCNService, SettlementService, SupplierMatcher, VisaNetworkService)
VisaNetworkService — Visa SMS API integration with full request/response types
Remove RFPManager and AuditService from SDK

decisions.decision: Globe settlement animation uses SVG overlay for arc (not cobe arcs API)
decisions.rationale: cobe v2 update() does not support arc updates dynamically

decisions.decision: Card issuance animation replaced globe with scan-beam card build animation
decisions.rationale: User requested card generation feel instead of globe

decisions.decision: SDK scoped to VCNService + SettlementService + SupplierMatcher + VisaNetworkService only
decisions.rationale: User removed RFPManager and AuditService as out of scope

decisions.decision: VisaNetworkService uses sandbox mode (no credentials) and live HTTP mode
decisions.rationale: Supports both dev and production use without forcing real Visa credentials

next_action: All phase-03 work is complete and pushed. Next: new feature requests or new phase.
context_notes: Session was UI polish + SDK extraction. Main portal pushed to ericomack1983/vgov-hackathon, SDK to ericomack1983/visa-gov-sdk. Context at ~84% — good stopping point.
